title: Telegram Bot
description: Send and receive messages via Telegram Bot API
author: Jarvis Inc

options.label: Send approvals via Telegram
options.description: Route pending approvals to Telegram with inline APPROVE/DISMISS buttons

options.label: CEO alerts via Telegram
options.description: Send CEO proactive messages to Telegram

commands.name: send_message
commands.description: Send a message to a Telegram chat

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Telegram chat ID to send to

parameters.name: reply_markup
parameters.description: JSON string of inline keyboard markup for buttons

commands.name: get_updates
commands.description: Get recent updates (messages, callback queries) sent to the bot

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of updates to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Identifier of the first update to be returned (for pagination)

parameters.name: allowed_updates
parameters.description: List of update types to receive (e.g. ['callback_query'])

returns.description: JSON array of Telegram Update objects
